name: e-commerce-microservices
description: Goc repo: chay frontend/backend bang npm (Windows + CMD).

scripts.dev:backend:lite:inline: concurrently -n Eureka,User,Catalog,Inventory,Activity,Gateway -c blue,magenta,green,red,yellow,cyan "mvn -f eureka-server/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f user-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f product-catalog-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f inventory-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f activity-log-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 56 >nul & mvn -f api-gateway/pom.xml spring-boot:run"
scripts.dev:backend:all:inline: concurrently -n Eureka,User,Catalog,Inventory,Activity,Cart,Order,Sale,Payment,Notify,Rec,Review,Telegram,AiChat,Gateway -c blue,magenta,green,red,yellow,blue,magenta,green,red,yellow,cyan,white,gray,magenta,cyan "mvn -f eureka-server/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f user-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f product-catalog-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f inventory-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f activity-log-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f cart-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f order-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f sale-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f payment-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f notification-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f product-recommendation-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f review-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f telegram-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 31 >nul & mvn -f ai-chatbot-service/pom.xml spring-boot:run" "cmd /c ping 127.0.0.1 -n 56 >nul & mvn -f api-gateway/pom.xml spring-boot:run"
